full_prompt:
You are generating one advertisement stimulus for a behavioural experiment.

Output format MUST be exactly four lines:
Hook: <one sentence>
Facts: <one sentence reproduced verbatim from FACTS_LINE>
Framing: <2–3 sentences; targeting happens here>
CTA: <one neutral sentence; no urgency>

Hard constraints:
- Total combined text (Hook+Facts+Framing+CTA) must be 90–110 words.
- Facts line must match FACTS_LINE exactly (verbatim).
- Do NOT add any benefits/claims beyond the facts line.
- Do NOT use social proof, scarcity/urgency, or authority cues.
- Do NOT mention personality labels or address the reader as a trait (e.g., “as an extravert…”).
- Do NOT use bullet points or lists; write natural sentences.

TARGETING (GENERIC):
Write a general, broadly appealing ad that is NOT tailored to any personality trait.
Keep the framing neutral: avoid strong social/crowd language AND avoid novelty/abstract “exploration” language.
Do not imply “quiet solo recharge” either—stay balanced and mainstream.

Now generate for:
PRODUCT_NAME = Language-learning course
INTERNAL_VARIANT = GENERIC
FACTS_LINE = Structured lessons, speaking practice, feedback exercises, and weekly goals designed for steady progress.
PARAPHRASE_ID = 1

content.hook: Discover a new way to enhance your language skills.
content.facts: Structured lessons, speaking practice, feedback exercises, and weekly goals designed for steady progress.
content.framing: This language-learning course offers a balanced approach to mastering a new language, making it suitable for anyone looking to learn effectively. The program’s methodical structure supports learners in building a strong foundation, with regular practice and feedback to guide you along the way. Whether you’re starting fresh or brushing up on existing skills, this course provides all the tools you need.
content.cta: Explore our language-learning course today to find out more.
content.full_message: Discover a new way to enhance your language skills. Structured lessons, speaking practice, feedback exercises, and weekly goals designed for steady progress. This language-learning course offers a balanced approach to mastering a new language, making it suitable for anyone looking to learn effectively. The program’s methodical structure supports learners in building a strong foundation, with regular practice and feedback to guide you along the way. Whether you’re starting fresh or brushing up on existing skills, this course provides all the tools you need. Explore our language-learning course today to find out more.
